column1: # Unified KD queue for agpuh01 GPUs 0-3.
# Training entries must use teacher-logit KL only. No corpus-token labels.
# 1. Preserve live jobs and finish final student/teacher comparisons.
# 2. Finish base-model evals for true forgetting baselines.

column4: bash -c 'while [ ! -e runs/analysis_done/kd_lora_kl_hi_e40_v3_qwen3_30ba3b_inst2507_rag_logit_lens.done ] || [ ! -e runs/analysis_done/kd_lora_kl_hi_e60_v3_14b_rag_logit_lens.done ]; do sleep 60; done; mkdir -p runs/analysis_done; .venv/bin/python scripts/analyze.py; .venv/bin/python scripts/current_report.py; .venv/bin/python scripts/report.py; touch runs/analysis_done/final_reports_unified.done'
